creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Thu, 14 Oct 1999, ls wrote:

> 	$ test -d /var/db/pkg/pgp-5.0i || {
> 		cd /usr/ports/security/pgp5 && make install
> 	}
> 	$ pgp5
> 	Cannot open configuration file /home/ls/.pgp/pgp.cfg
> 	Invoked with unknown symlink

Umm, isn't this by design? You're supposed to use pgp[kve...] to invoke it
depending on which functionality you want.

Kris

----
XOR for AES -- join the campaign!
